meaning: n.政务会,理事会,委员会,参议会,讨论会议,顾问班子,立法班子
examples: The members left the council chamber.
The Tree Council promotes tree planting.
The Council answered those questions in the negative.
Anglesey council said it supported the recommendations and that it was already making good progress.
The winner will work with the council on the final design for the square.
